name: Mexican Pizza
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon Enriched Corn Meal (Aunt Jemima or Quaker)
1/2 cup Enriched Corn Meal (Aunt Jemima or Quaker)
15 ounces Mexican Style Chili Beans (Van Camp's), undrained
1 medium Green or red bell pepper, cut into thin rings
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450°F.
2. Grease a 14-inch round pizza pan or a 15x10-inch jelly roll pan.
3. Sprinkle one tablespoon of corn meal evenly into the prepared pan.
4. In a bowl, combine the remaining half cup of corn meal, flour, baking powder, and salt. Add milk and oil; stir with a fork until a dough forms.
5. Press the dough into the prepared pan and shape the edge to form a rim.
6. Bake for 15 minutes.
7. Spread taco sauce evenly over the partially baked crust.
8. Top with beans, pepper rings, and cheese. Continue baking for 10 more minutes or until the cheese is melted.
NUTRITIONAL ANALYSIS per serving:
calories 365
carbohydrates 39 g
protein 14 g
fat 17 g
calcium 348 mg
sodium 740 mg
cholesterol 30 mg
dietary fiber 5 g
